Container.Name: Xnoppo
Container.Overview: Use Emby as the interface and an OPPO UDP-20x (e.g. 203) as the player: cast a movie from any Emby client to the "Xnoppo" device and this bridge tells the OPPO to mount the media over SMB and play it. Headless, no web UI. Every library of the configured Emby user works automatically.

Config.Name: Emby Server URL
Config.Description: Emby base URL including port, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8096

Config.Name: OPPO IP
Config.Description: IP address of the OPPO player

Config.Name: SMB User
Config.Description: SMB username for the share. Leave empty for anonymous/guest.

Config.Name: Keep OPPO On
Config.Description: true = leave the OPPO powered on after playback (turn it off with its remote). false = power off when playback ends.

Config.Name: Library IDs
Config.Description: * = all libraries. Or a comma-separated list of Emby library Ids to restrict.

Config.Name: Path Mapping (JSON)
Config.Description: Usually leave as []. Only needed for libraries Emby stores under a non-UNC mount point. JSON array of {name,Emby_Path,Oppo_Path}; use \\\\ for backslashes.

Config.Name: OPPO Connect Timeout
Config.Description: Seconds to wait for the OPPO control port

Config.Name: OPPO Mount Timeout
Config.Description: Seconds to wait for an SMB mount

Config.Name: OPPO Play Timeout
Config.Description: Seconds to wait for playback to start

Config.Name: SMB Trick
Config.Description: Legacy SMB workaround; leave off unless needed

Config.Name: Autoscript Unmount
Config.Description: Telnet-unmount the share after playback; leave off
